faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Hewlett home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in woolens, cashmere, or other natural fabrics, silky webbing in closet corners, small beige or gold moths flying near wardrobes, and larvae casings on clothing or carpets. You may also notice adult moths attracted to lights in bedrooms or closets. Our Hewlett technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations and assess the extent of damage.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of clothes moth control in Hewlett?

Larger Hewlett properties with multiple closets, storage areas, or valuable textile collections may require more extensive treatment. We provide free estimates and customized treatment plans based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and fabrics in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved treatments specifically designed for use around clothing and fabrics that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Our methods target moths in all life stages while protecting your valuable garments, upholstery, and carpets. We provide detailed preparation instructions and can accommodate sensitive items or special requests from Hewlett residents.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning to my Hewlett home?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regular cleaning of closets, proper storage of woolens and natural fibers in sealed containers, vacuuming carpets and upholstered furniture regularly, and maintaining low humidity levels. We provide Hewlett homeowners with comprehensive prevention strategies, including cedar products, pheromone traps, and seasonal inspection services to keep your home moth-free year-round.
